details.tier_reason: Harness automation script and operational guide update; no product runtime changes.
details.source_review: User supplied Claude CLI review of TASK-20260428-001 wrapper and approved the recommended hardening plan.
scope: Change default model from undocumented best alias to official alias or explicit override behavior.
Validate refs.spec and refs.ledger before execution.
Separate system guidance from handoff stdin where supported.
Document git write policy and stderr sensitivity.

next_action: Patch scripts/run-generator.mjs and generator pipeline guide, then run validation.

changes: Default model changed from undocumented best alias to official opus alias.
System guidance moved to --append-system-prompt while stdin carries only handoff payload.
refs.spec existence and refs.ledger task matching are validated before execution.
Same-task lockfile guard added at tasks/handoffs/TASK-{ID}/.generator.lock for real runs.
Git write tools remain disabled by default and require --allow-git-write.
stderr sensitivity and Researcher model selection notes documented.

next_action: Run syntax, dry-run, bypass, encoding, diff, and harness audits.

validation_commands.observed_command_shape: claude --bare --print --model opus --effort xhigh --append-system-prompt <system guidance> --input-format text --output-format json --no-session-persistence --permission-mode auto --allowedTools Read,Edit,Write,Bash(npm test),Bash(git diff *),Bash(git status *) --disallowedTools WebSearch,WebFetch

validation_commands.notes: Git write tools appear only with explicit --allow-git-write.
Only Git CRLF conversion warnings; no whitespace errors.

criteria_results.criterion: Default model is official alias, not best.
System guidance separated from handoff stdin.
Same-task lock guard exists for real runs.
Git write tools require explicit opt-in.

summary: Final report and quality score written for Generator wrapper hardening
next_action: Run final audit, commit completion artifacts, squash merge to main, and push origin/main.
